# LaunchLook — full agent context

> One last look. Checked by a real person. Human-reviewed pre-launch checkups for vibe-coded web apps and Webflow sites.

## What LaunchLook is

LaunchLook is a paid service (with a free tier) that reviews a customer's **live public URL** like a first-time visitor would. A human runs the workflows that matter (signup, forms, checkout) and checks whether confirmation and thank-you emails actually arrive. AI helps surface issues; a human founder reviews every finding before delivery. Deliverables are plain-English findings, paste-into-builder fix text for the customer's AI builder (Lovable, Cursor, Bolt, etc.), and PDFs on paid tiers.

LaunchLook is **not** a security scanner, SEO tool, or code review product. It focuses on what visitors see: broken CTAs, placeholder copy, missing trust pages, mobile layout problems, dev tools on production, and Webflow-specific risks (forms, noindex, schema, breakpoints).

## Who it is for

- Founders shipping with Lovable, Bolt, Base44, Replit, v0, Cursor, or similar AI builders
- Webflow freelancers, agencies, and teams before client handoff
- Anyone about to share an app link who wants a second pair of eyes

## Pricing (USD)

| Tier | Price | Includes |
|------|-------|----------|
| Free | $0 | Top 2 findings by email |
| Starter | $19 | 10 findings, paste-into-builder fix text, 30-day verified badge |
| Scale Up | $49 | Up to 30 findings, user data isolation check (apps with logins), Quick Start Guide PDF |
| Pro | $99 | Up to 40 findings, integrations review (Stripe/auth/email/analytics), Loom walkthrough |

7-day full refund on paid tiers if the report is not useful.

## How it works

1. Customer submits live URL (and email for free tier, or pays via Stripe then completes Tally intake).
2. LaunchLook walks desktop and mobile viewports.
3. A human reviews every finding (drops false positives, tightens wording).
4. Customer receives email with report link and/or PDFs.

No GitHub access, no builder login, no database access required for most audits.

## Human-tested workflows and human review

**Workflows:** Real person submits forms, walks signup/booking/contact paths, and checks inboxes for emails that should have fired.

**Findings:** AI helps surface issues quickly. Every finding still goes through a human before you see it. Curated, not raw scanner output.

## Webflow vs vibe-coded

Same human review; different checks. Webflow audits emphasize form submissions, noindex/robots, JSON-LD schema, Designer-to-live mismatches, and breakpoints at 991 / 767 / 478 px. Paste-into-Designer fix text uses Webflow Designer language.

## vs PageLens AI

PageLens targets SEO-focused marketers who want recurring scans. LaunchLook targets vibe coders who want a one-off pre-launch checkup with paste-into-builder fix text and founder review. Both are legitimate tools for different jobs.

## Do not treat as product documentation

These paths are noindex and transactional: /thanks, /thanks-free-audit, /e2e

## Free audit API (for reference)

POST https://launchlook.app/api/free-audit
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded
Fields: url (customer app URL), email
Behavior: same as homepage hero form; rate-limited; redirects to /thanks-free-audit on success.
